narration: You crushed your workout, ate clean all week, and nailed that big deadline. So you bought something nice — you deserved it, right? That phrase is quietly draining thousands from you.
visual: Person silhouette holding a shopping bag, 'I DESERVE THIS' text springs into frame in bold amber. Sub-text: 'THAT PHRASE IS COSTING YOU THOUSANDS'.

narration: Scientists call it moral licensing. When you do something virtuous, your brain hands itself a permission slip to splurge — and studies show that makes you 40% more likely to blow money right after.
visual: Brain icon in center on light background, checkmark on left labeled 'GOOD DEED DONE', shopping cart on right labeled 'REWARD UNLOCKED'. Amber arrow pulses from brain to cart.

narration: Number one trigger: the gym visit. Number two: sticking to your diet. Number three: finishing a tough work deadline. Each one flips the exact same switch in your brain.
visual: Three icons spring in staggered: dumbbell, salad bowl, laptop with checkmark. Dashed amber arrows converge from all three down to a central shopping cart. Numbered 1, 2, 3.

narration: Here's the math. Seventy-three percent of Americans self-reward regularly, spending around $400 a month doing it. That's $4,800 a year — every year — on purchases that felt earned.
visual: Large amber dollar counter animates from $0 to $4,800. Below it, 12 amber monthly bars fill in one by one across a bar chart, each labeled $400.

narration: But here's what it actually costs you. Four thousand eight hundred dollars a year, invested instead, grows to $576,000 over thirty years. Your little treats are eating your entire retirement.
visual: Two growing bars side by side — left (red) climbs to $4,800 labeled 'SPENT ON TREATS/YR', right (green) shoots up to $576K labeled 'INVESTED OVER 30 YRS'. Amber caption: 'YOUR TREATS ARE EATING YOUR RETIREMENT'.

narration: The fix isn't to stop rewarding yourself — just pause for 24 hours before you buy. That one gap kills 67% of these impulse splurges. Follow for more money truths like this.
visual: Hourglass with amber sand draining, '24 HRS' displayed in center. Below: stat '67% of splurges disappear after 24 hours'. Amber CTA button: 'FOLLOW FOR MORE MONEY TRUTHS'.
